@startuml
title 登录验证

participant "WEB" as WEB1 #lightblue
box "" #WhiteSmoke [0]
    participant "API" as API1 #lightgray 
end box 

database Redis { }


== == 


rectangle login <<Login>>{
}



login -> PMS : 请求用户信息\n用户名密码  
PMS --> login:返回GUID  

note right of login:PMS是权限管理系统，\n负责存储用户的角色和菜单等信息。  


group Cache缓存层<<Cache Layer>>#LightGreen[2]{    
   rectangle cache_layer <<cache layer >>as CL{}   
     note left of CL:\n如果开启Redis,\n则从redis中读取数据。\n否则直接从内存获取.\n默认不开启 redis .     
      activate CL      
       alt if enable_redis=true then        
          loop for each key in keys do            
             get_value_from_db(key)              
           endloop         
         else           
            return null          
        endif       
 deactivate CL    

 group Access Token Generation & Validation<<Access_Token_Gen_Validation>>[#FFCCCC][3]{     

 rect access_token_generation_rect <<access token generation process>>>ATG(){             
              generate_access_token(user_id,guid);               
               save_to_cache_or_database(access_token,user_info_data_structure_object_reference_pointer_address_location_memory_heap_stack_queue_list_array_map_dictionary_hash_table_set_tree_graph_network_topology_model_view_controller_framework_library_module_package_class_interface_abstract_concrete_static_dynamic_final_transient_volatile_synchronized_native_strictfp_enum_annotation_element_type_parameter_bound_wildcard_upper_lower_super_this_new_delete_throw_catch_finally_try_assert_switch_case_default_break_continue_return_yield_goto_do_while_for_if_else_when_match_with_as_is_in_not_and_or_xor_nand_xnor_implies_iff_tautology_contrapositive_inverse_negation_disjunction_conjuction_biconditional_material_implication_logical_equivalence_truth_function_proposition_statement_formula_expression_term_atom_literal_variable_constant_symbol_operator_predicate_quantifier_universal_existential_unique_none_some_all_any_no_yes_true_false_maybe_unknown_null_void_empty_nil_nan_inf_posinf_neginf_complex_real_imaginary_rational_integer_float_double_long_short_byte_char_boolean_string_text_binary_blob_file_stream_socket_channel_pipe_fifo_semaphore_mutex_lock_condition_signal_event_flag_barrier_latch_countdown_cycle_phased_reentrant_read_write_optimistic_pessimistic_exclusive_shared_upgrade_downgrade_timeout_deadlock_starvation_race_hazard_atomicity_consistency_durability_serializability_snapshot_dirty_repeatable_committed_uncommitted_nonrepeatable_ghost
